services.title: Project Inception Analysis/Desk Study
services.description: Initial assessment and desk study to outline the project's scope, objectives, and preliminary feasibility based on existing data.
services.fullDescription: Our project inception and desk studies provide an essential first step in evaluating project potential, relying on comprehensive data review and preliminary analysis to guide future actions.

services.title: Feasibility Studies
services.description: Detailed technical, economic, environmental, and social assessment to determine whether a hydropower project is practical, sustainable, and financially viable before construction.
services.fullDescription: We conduct in-depth feasibility studies to evaluate the technical, economic, and environmental viability of projects before implementation. This ensures minimized risks and optimized planning.

services.title: Detail Engineering Design
services.description: A Comprehensive engineering design, analysis, sizing, detailing, and preparation of construction-ready drawings for all civil, hydraulic, hydromechanical, and electromechanical systems.
services.fullDescription: Our detailed engineering design services provide accurate blueprints, 3D models, and comprehensive technical specifications necessary for flawless construction and execution.

services.title: Due Diligence Audit
services.description: Comprehensive independent assessment to evaluate the technical, financial, legal, environmental, and contractual aspects of the project before investment, financing, acquisition, or major decision-making.
services.fullDescription: We perform meticulous due diligence audits to assess the current status, risks, and compliance of projects, providing stakeholders with transparent and actionable insights.

services.title: Tender Evaluations
services.description: Expert evaluation of tender documents, bids, and proposals to ensure selection of the most capable and cost-effective contractors and suppliers.
services.fullDescription: We offer comprehensive tender evaluation services, analyzing bids for technical compliance, financial viability, and overall value to help clients make informed procurement decisions.

services.title: Construction Supervision and Monitoring
services.description: Continuous site inspection, material testing, measurement and verification of quantities, and monitoring of construction progress to ensure safety and environmental compliance, and to confirm that all civil, hydromechanical, and electromechanical works are executed in accordance with approved design drawings, technical specifications, quality standards, and contract requirements.
services.fullDescription: Our construction supervision teams ensure that projects are built according to design specifications, adhering strictly to safety regulations and quality standards.

services.title: Bill Verification
services.description: Checking, reviewing, and certifying payment bills based on physical progress of work at site.
services.fullDescription: We offer independent bill verification services to ensure that contractors' invoices accurately reflect the work completed, preventing overpayment and ensuring financial integrity.

services.title: Testing and Commissioning
services.description: Systematic process of ensuring all project components perform according to design intent and operational requirements before final handover.
services.fullDescription: Our testing and commissioning services verify that all systems, equipment, and structures function as designed, ensuring safe and efficient operation from day one.

services.title: Survey and Investigations
services.description: Detailed Topographic Survey; Geophysical Survey (ERT, SRT, MASW); Core Drilling, Soil and Material Testing; Hydrology, Sediment, Geological Mapping, and Environmental Survey.
services.fullDescription: Our advanced surveying and investigation services provide critical baseline data for engineering design, utilizing modern equipment for maximum accuracy.

services.title: Physical/Numerical Modelling
services.description: Scale modelling and numerical simulations for complex engineering structures and fluid dynamics.
services.fullDescription: We create precise physical models and conduct advanced numerical simulations to analyze complex hydraulic and structural engineering projects, allowing for rigorous testing before full-scale construction.

services.title: Repair, Maintenance, Rehabilitation and Upgradation during Plant Operation
services.description: Ongoing support services including routine maintenance, major repairs, facility rehabilitation, and system upgrades to ensure optimal plant performance and longevity.
services.fullDescription: Our operation and maintenance services provide comprehensive solutions for keeping your plant running at peak efficiency, extending its lifespan, and adapting to new operational requirements.
